chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-689 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 09.10.2025 None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Asad Ahmed, Advocate for the Respondent/KMC. Mr. K.A Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the KMC has filed a statement under his signature enclosing a report prepared by the Director (Welfare) Finance & Accounts KMC, which reflects that the pension case of the petitioner has been finalized, with an amount of Rs.847,309/- being due and payable, and it is being stated that his monthly pension is otherwise being paid on regular basis. He undertakes that the aforementioned amount will be settled within a period of thirty days from today. In view of the foregoing statement/ undertaking, the Petition stands disposed of in the foregoing terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
